no: Overhauls the existing Beast Master ranger kit. Adds scaling Charm Animal with save penalties, Find Familiar (pseudo/fairy dragon), Animal Summoning I-III at levels 3/6/9, Conjure Animals at 12. Restores all weapon proficiencies. Modifies CLABRN04.2DA and WEAPPROF.2DA. Does not add a new kit — modifies vanilla Beast Master. English only. Supports BGEE, BG2EE, IWDEE, EET.
sum: Overhauls the Beast Master ranger kit with scaling Charm Animal, Find Familiar-like companion, and balance tweaks.

co.no: Modifies vanilla Beast Master CLAB (CLABRN04.2DA) and restores weapon proficiencies via WEAPPROF.2DA. Patches all ITM files to remove Beast Master weapon restrictions.
